name: Creamy Artichoke and Oyster Soup
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground Pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Reserve four artichoke hearts for garnish; cut the remaining ones in half or into quarters and set aside.
2. Blend the reserved artichokes with their liquid.
3. Make a white roux using the butter and flour, cooking them together without browning, stirring constantly.
4. Stir in the artichoke puree, oysters' liquid (if using fresh oysters), and 1 cup of milk. Add green onions, garlic, thyme, and parsley, then season with salt and pepper.
5. Simmer for about 10 minutes or until the flavors are well blended.
6. Gently add the oysters and cream to the mixture, heating just until the oysters puff up and curl around the edges.
7. Serve immediately in deep bowls, garnished with the reserved artichoke hearts.
